@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "keda-4724-add-temporal-io-scaler",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "keda: Add Temporal.io Scaler",
+    "description": "Add Temporal.io Scaler. Requested by 10+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current keda deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your keda version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nhelm list -n keda 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working keda installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review keda configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant keda configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get configmap -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=keda\n```\n### Proposal\n\nAdd a Temporal.io Scaler to Keda so that workers can scale when the number of Open Workflows increases."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add Temporal.io Scaler",
+        "description": "Added a scaler for [https://temporal.io/](https://temporal.io/)\r\n\nRelates to [Docs 1163](https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs/pull/1163)\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n keda -l app.kubernetes.io/name=keda\nkubectl get events -n keda --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add Temporal.io Scaler\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added a scaler for [https://temporal.io/](https://temporal.io/)\r\n\nRelates to [Docs 1163](https://github.com/kedacore/keda-docs/pull/1163)",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
